title: Ryanair Is Being Investigated for Charging Parents to Sit Next to Their Children
summary_full: Britain’s competition watchdog will determine whether the airline’s mandatory fee is unfair. The low-cost airline called the investigation “bogus.”
summary_public: Britain’s competition watchdog will determine whether the airline’s mandatory fee is unfair. The low-cost airline called the investigation “bogus.”

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Britain’s competition watchdog will determine whether the airline’s mandatory fee is unfair.
